title: Insert Data
description: Add a new record to a table by specifying the target columns and their corresponding values.
problemStatement:
New arrival! Insert a new user into the `users` table with `username` set to `'john_doe'` and `email` set to `'john@example.com'`.

**Requirement:** Use the `INSERT INTO` syntax.
hints: Make sure the order of columns in your `INSERT` statement matches the order of the values.
expectedOutput: One row inserted into the users table
